introSection: Mad Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA. It was manufactured by Arrow Dynamics and opened on May 8, 1999 as a replacement for the similar coaster Rails, which was eventually moved to Jolly Roger Amusement Park in Maryland in 1998. The ride's track and supports were designed by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Mad Mouse was announced on October 27, 1998. The ride opened on May 8, 1999.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Previously, the ride had red track and white, purple, and red supports. In 2011, the track was repainted orange while the supports were repainted yellow.

fullText:
Mad Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA. It was manufactured by Arrow Dynamics and opened on May 8, 1999 as a replacement for the similar coaster Rails, which was eventually moved to Jolly Roger Amusement Park in Maryland in 1998. The ride's track and supports were designed by Ride Centerline.

Mad Mouse was announced on October 27, 1998. The ride opened on May 8, 1999.



Previously, the ride had red track and white, purple, and red supports. In 2011, the track was repainted orange while the supports were repainted yellow.
